name: x
description: X (Twitter) growth toolkit for Codex — precision batch-follow campaigns with 4-layer anti-detection.

interface.longDescription: Parameterized batch-follow tooling for X (Twitter): verified-only filtering, follower-count thresholds, bio keyword blacklist/whitelist, 4-layer anti-detection (browser fingerprint + behavioral pacing + anomaly sensing + irreversible-action guards). Default preset targets 蓝V互关 (blue-verified mutual-follow) use case. Refined from a real 100/100 follow / 3h / 0 risk-control-triggered campaign.
